body.purpose: Evidence, labels, descriptions, and form values.

shadows.name: low-surface-lift
shadows.purpose: Forms, icon buttons, and panels at rest.

shadows.name: interactive-lift
shadows.purpose: Hovered panels and elevated interactive states.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main command button for analysis and source operations.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 42px; padding: 0 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(5, 74, 62, 0.18); border-radius: 6px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #19816c, #0a5848); color: #ffffff; font: 850 16px "Segoe UI", Arial, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(20, 114, 95, 0.24), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.2); transition: background-color 160ms ease, box-shadow 160ms ease, transform 160ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: linear-gradient(180deg, #177762, #084b3e); box-shadow: 0 16px 30px rgba(20, 114, 95, 0.28), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.18); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(36, 95, 159, 0.22); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Supporting command button for refresh, diagnostics, and secondary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { min-height: 42px; padding: 0 16px; border: 1px solid #d4ddda; border-radius: 6px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff, #f6f9f8); color: #073e35; font: 850 16px "Segoe UI", Arial, sans-serif; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.74); transition: background-color 160ms ease, border-color 160ms ease, color 160ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #9fc0b7; background: #f1faf7; color: #0a5848; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(36, 95, 159, 0.22); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Evidence Panel
components.description: Raised information panel for metrics, evidence, and operational records.
components.css: .ds-panel { position: relative; max-width: 520px; padding: 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(205,218,214,0.92); border-radius: 8px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.99), rgba(250,252,252,0.96)); color: #17211f; box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(10,27,24,0.07), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.74); } .ds-panel h3 { margin: 0 0 12px; color: #07100e; font: 800 15px/1.35 "Segoe UI", Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 14px; padding: 10px 0; border-top: 1px solid #e8eeec; } .ds-row span { color: #60716d; } .ds-row strong { color: #07100e; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Compact working field for source paths, filters, and operator input.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 7px; color: #40534e; font: 800 12px/1.2 "Segoe UI", Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-field input { min-height: 42px; border: 1px solid #d4ddda; border-radius: 6px; padding: 10px 11px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff, #fbfcfc); color: #17211f; font: 400 16px/1.55 "Segoe UI", Arial, sans-serif; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.9), 0 1px 0 rgba(10,27,24,0.03); } .ds-field input:focus { border-color: rgba(20,114,95,0.74); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(20,114,95,0.14), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.9); outline: 0; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav
components.description: Deep cockpit navigation shell with clear active state.
components.html: <nav class="ds-nav"><button class="ds-nav-item ds-active">History analysis</button><button class="ds-nav-item">System status</button></nav>
components.css: .ds-nav { display: grid; gap: 8px; width: 240px; padding: 16px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #10211e, #0c1715); border-radius: 8px; } .ds-nav-item { min-height: 44px; padding: 11px 12px; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; text-align: left; color: #dbe9e5; background: transparent; font: 750 16px "Segoe UI", Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: #ffffff; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.075); } .ds-nav-item.ds-active { color: #ffffff; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(28,68,60,0.96), rgba(18,49,43,0.96)); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.09), 0 10px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.18); }

narrative.overview: ThreadTrace should feel like a private cockpit for a young technical operator: sharp, credible, and satisfying to use without falling into hacker theatrics. The interface serves analysis, source operations, and evidence review, so it should be dense enough for real work while keeping the visual field calm and navigable.
keyCharacteristics: Built for one expert operator moving quickly.

rules.name: The No Single-Color Rule
rules.body: Never let the product become only green, only blue, or only grayscale. Teal is the operational accent, not the whole personality.

rules.name: The Gold Is A Mark Rule
rules.body: Gold belongs to identity moments. It is prohibited as a general CTA color.

rules.name: The Product Type Rule
rules.body: No display typography theatrics. This is a working cockpit; type must help scanning and confidence.

rules.name: The Structural Depth Rule
rules.body: Shadows must clarify layer and interaction. If a shadow only makes the UI look expensive, remove it.

dos: Do keep the UI young, sharp, and personally useful.
Do use multiple deliberate color roles: deep shell, cool canvas, teal action, gold identity, semantic status.
Do preserve evidence density while keeping row separation, labels, and panel titles easy to scan.
Do make source operations, review flows, and analysis results feel like one coherent cockpit.
Do keep focus states visible and keyboard-friendly.
donts: Don't make it look like a generic admin template.
Don't make it look like an ordinary enterprise system with default white cards and default form controls.
Don't use dark hacker terminal styling, neon cyberpunk colors, or fake command-center drama.
Don't collapse the product into a single-color theme.
Don't make it feel like software for old-fashioned enterprise users.
Don't use loud AI SaaS landing-page tropes, decorative gradient text, gradient blobs, or marketing-first hero layouts.
Don't use border-left or border-right accents greater than 1px on cards or alerts.
